title: Building Interactive UIs in VS Code with MCP Apps — Marlene Mhangami & Liam Hampton, GitHub
summary: GitHub's MCP Apps enable building interactive user interfaces that render directly in VS Code's chat window as sandboxed iframes. The mechanism uses MCP tools to return data and HTML resources, allowing real-time bidirectional communication between the editor and backend applications, demonstrated with flame graphs, checkout flows, and interactive diagrams.
